requirement_topic.en: ESERA SSEG / Net-Metering and EEC Grid-Connection Review
requirement_topic.zh: ESERA小规模嵌入式发电 / 净计量及EEC并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: ESERA小規模嵌入式發電 / 淨計量及EEC併網審查

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverter projects in Eswatini should be planned around three local gates: SWASA conformity expectations for standards compliance, ESERA licensing or approval for small-scale embedded generation and net-metering, and EEC connection review before energisation. Eswatini uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz nominal low-voltage system; the 50 Hz frequency matches China, though the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. A matching frequency does not remove the need for local protection settings, anti-islanding evidence, commissioning review, and utility approval. In practice, Southern African NRS 097-2 style interconnection requirements may be used or requested, especially because Eswatini is a SADC and SACU member and imports much of its electricity from South Africa's Eskom system.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼并网光伏逆变器项目应围绕三个当地门槛规划：SWASA对标准合规的合格评定预期、ESERA对小规模嵌入式发电和净计量的许可或批准，以及EEC在送电前的接入审查。埃斯瓦蒂尼低压系统名义参数为230/400 V、50 Hz，与中国名义230/400 V方向较为接近。但名义电压和频率一致并不免除当地保护整定、防孤岛证据、调试审查和公用事业批准。实践中可能采用或要求南部非洲NRS 097-2式并网要求，特别是埃斯瓦蒂尼为SADC和SACU成员且大部分电力从南非Eskom系统进口。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼併網光伏逆變器項目應圍繞三個當地門檻規劃：SWASA對標準合規的合格評定預期、ESERA對小規模嵌入式發電和淨計量的許可或批准，以及EEC在送電前的接入審查。埃斯瓦蒂尼低壓系統名義參數為230/400 V、50 Hz，與中國名義230/400 V方向較為接近。但名義電壓和頻率一致並不免除當地保護整定、防孤島證據、調試審查和公用事業批准。實務中可能採用或要求南部非洲NRS 097-2式併網要求，特別是埃斯瓦蒂尼為SADC和SACU成員且大部分電力從南非Eskom系統進口。

standards_or_laws: ESERA small-scale embedded generation and net-metering policy framework
EEC grid-connection approval and commissioning requirements
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
NRS 097-2 — Grid interconnection of embedded generation, likely relevant in Southern African practice

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power stations, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, and domestic anti-islanding or utility-interface test reports. These documents are built for Chinese grid-operator requirements and do not automatically satisfy ESERA licensing, EEC connection review, or NRS 097-2 style Southern African interconnection expectations. Even where the nominal voltage is similar, Chinese factory firmware, relay limits, reconnection timing, and utility interface documentation should be reviewed against Eswatini project conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及国内防孤岛或公用事业接口测试报告。这些文件服务于中国电网运营商要求，不会自动满足ESERA许可、EEC接入审查或NRS 097-2式南部非洲并网预期。即使名义电压相近，也应将中国出厂固件、继电保护限值、重连时间和公用事业接口文件对照埃斯瓦蒂尼项目条件复核。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及國內防孤島或公用事業介面測試報告。這些文件服務於中國電網運營商要求，不會自動滿足ESERA許可、EEC接入審查或NRS 097-2式南部非洲併網預期。即使名義電壓相近，也應將中國出廠韌體、繼電保護限值、重連時間和公用事業介面文件對照埃斯瓦蒂尼項目條件複核。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T or NB/T grid-connection documents should be treated as supporting evidence only. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, a grid-code settings sheet for Eswatini's 230/400 V 50 Hz system, anti-islanding and reconnection settings, and any NRS 097-2 style declarations requested by the local engineer or EEC. ESERA licensing or net-metering approval and EEC connection approval remain local gates that Chinese domestic approvals do not replace.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T或NB/T并网文件应仅作为支持性证据。出口商应准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、适用于埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V 50 Hz系统的电网代码设置表、防孤岛和重连设置，以及当地工程师或EEC要求的任何NRS 097-2式声明。ESERA许可或净计量批准及EEC接入批准仍是当地门槛，中国国内批准不能替代。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T或NB/T併網文件應僅作為支持性證據。出口商應準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、適用於埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V 50 Hz系統的電網代碼設置表、防孤島和重連設置，以及當地工程師或EEC要求的任何NRS 097-2式聲明。ESERA許可或淨計量批准及EEC接入批准仍是當地門檻，中國國內批准不能替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects: ESERA SSEG or net-metering approval and EEC connection review are project gates before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid-operator requirements but does not transfer automatically to ESERA or EEC acceptance in Eswatini

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat ESERA approval and EEC connection review as separate local gates from any Chinese domestic grid-connection approval. Prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and an Eswatini 230/400 V 50 Hz settings file, and confirm whether the project engineer or EEC requires NRS 097-2 style documentation. Chinese GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021 evidence is not automatically accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请将ESERA批准和EEC接入审查视为独立于任何中国国内并网批准的当地门槛。准备IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据和埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V 50 Hz设置文件，并确认项目工程师或EEC是否要求NRS 097-2式文件。中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021证据不会自动被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請將ESERA批准和EEC接入審查視為獨立於任何中國國內併網批准的當地門檻。準備IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據和埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V 50 Hz設置文件，並確認項目工程師或EEC是否要求NRS 097-2式文件。中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021證據不會自動被接受。
